FREN351

From Romanticism to the Age of Modernism and Beyond

FREN352

From the Age of Epic and Romance to the Enlightenment

Select four additional FREN4xx level courses in literature, linguistics, ﬁlm, and culture, of which only one may be in English. FREN387 must be completed before any FREN4xx level course offered in French.
